TABLE 1: Job openings estimated rate and level changes between February 2026 and March 2026,
         and test of significance, seasonally adjusted

                                                   Estimated      Minimum   Pass test of   Estimated      Minimum   Pass test of
                                                 over-the-month significant significance over-the-month significant significance
     Industry and region                            change        change*                  change         change*

Total nonfarm                                        -0.1           0.3                      -56            517

  Total private                                      -0.1           0.3                      -54            490
    Mining and logging                                0.5           1.2                        3              8
    Construction                                      0.2           1.0                       23             91
    Manufacturing                                     0.1           0.6                       19             86

  Government                                          0.0           0.4                       -2             87
    Federal                                          -0.5           0.5                      -16             18

      State and local education                       0.0           0.4                       -3             42

           REGION

    Northeast                                         0.1           0.7                       61            205
    South                                            -0.2           0.5                      -88            350
    Midwest                                           0.0           0.6                      -11            222
    West                                             -0.1           0.6                      -18            223

  SOURCE: Bureau of Labor Statistics, Job Openings and Labor Turnover Survey, May 5, 2026.
  *NOTE:  Significant over-the-month changes are calculated at a 90-percent confidence level.  The median standard error
is used in testing the over-the-month change.
